title: tigridia × lilacea
intro: Tigridia × lilacea, also known as the 'Lilac Gladiolus' or 'Tiger Flower', is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Tigridia pavonia and Lilium candidum. It is valued for its ornamental value, with vibrant and colorful flowers, as well as its medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Tigridia × lilacea include extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to create teas, salves, and ointments that promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
